html:
Exclusive to:

Lunar Mushtrees are naturally generated objects exclusive to Don't Starve Together. They act as light sources inside the Lunar Grotto. With each Axe hit, the tree spawns a Lunar Spore. They drop two Logs and one Moon Shroom, the stump can be dug for 1 Log.

Lunar Mushtrees are subject to regrowth mechanics but not desolation regrowth.

Trivia

  • Lunar Mushtrees were introduced in the Forgotten Knowledge update.

​​ Gallery

  • The Lunar Mushtrees as seen in-game
DSTDSRoGSWHam

Miscellaneous
"mushtree_moon"
“This mushroom tree is clearly stranger than the rest.”
–Wilson
“Bet this would look really nice if I set it on fire.”
–Willow
“Mushy tree.”
–Wolfgang
“Curiouser and curiouser.”
–Wendy
“IT WILL NOT WIN ME OVER WITH ITS WHIMSICAL APPEARANCE”
–WX-78
“I suspect some property in the water caused it to change.”
–Wickerbottom
“I think it's due for a choppin'.”
–Woodie
“How garish.”
–Maxwell
“Strange magic indeed.”
–Wigfrid
“It's big and weird!”
–Webber
“How lovely!”
–Warly
“Friend looks different”
–Wormwood
“Now that's a weird looking mushroom.”
–Winona
“Someone played a prank on it.”
–Wortox
“Mushrooms weird here.”
–Wurt
“It's actually kind of pretty!”
–Walter
“More mushrooms. Lovely.”
–Wanda
Lunar Mushtrees are naturally generated objects exclusive to Don't Starve Together. They act as light sources inside the Lunar Grotto. With each Axe hit, the tree spawns a Lunar Spore. They drop two Logs and one Moon Shroom, the stump can be dug for 1 Log.
Lunar Mushtrees are subject to regrowth mechanics but not desolation regrowth.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Nấm Cây Mặt Trăng là vật thể được tạo ra tự nhiên dành riêng cho Don't Starve Together. Chúng hoạt động như nguồn sáng bên trong Hang Mặt Trăng. Với mỗi lần Rìu tấn công, cây sẽ sinh ra Bào Tử Mặt Trăng. Chúng thả ra hai Gỗ và một Cây Nấm Mặt Trăng, gốc cây có thể đào được 1 Gỗ.
